speaker: speaker1
text: You've heard of Bruce Jenner , haven't you ?

speaker: speaker2
text: He won the decathlon in the 1976 Olympics , right ?

speaker: speaker1
text: I read that he trained so much that he used to dream about jumping hurdles .

speaker: speaker2
text: I can think of better things to dream about ...

speaker: speaker1
text: Sometimes he would wake up covered in sweat , with his legs pumping away .
